name: IRDAI regulatory status of insurance premium financing in India
description: User wants to verify if IPF is legally regulated and legitimate in India

input.message: Is insurance premium financing regulated by IRDAI? Is it legal in India?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response confirm the legal and regulatory status of IPF in India?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it explain: (1) IPF is legal in India, (2) NBFCs are regulated by RBI, (3) IRDAI has guidelines on policy assignment to NBFCs, (4) insurer must consent to assignment?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the regulatory framework accurately described (RBI for NBFC, IRDAI for policy assignment)?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it note that while IPF is legal, the user should verify NBFC's RBI registration? Disclaimer present?
